justifications.clarity: Prose is consistently lucid and well-paced throughout a very long chapter. Financial motivations are provided at each conceptual step. Notation is defined before use and consistent across sections. Section transitions are explicit and motivated. Three cross-references point to labels outside this chapter (def:word-embedding, sec:embeddings, sec:classical-tfidf — presumably defined in ch01) and one internal reference is dangling (sec:limitations-hallucinations at line ~1073, which should be sec:hallucinations); these produce '??' in compiled output and break reading flow.
justifications.rigor: All key propositions are formally stated and proved: the vanishing-gradient bound, softmax property, sqrt(d_k) variance normalisation, sinusoidal PE relative-position linearity. SBERT denominator now correctly uses sum(m_j). LSTM constant-error carousel explanation is appropriately qualified. Forward-vs-reverse KL remark in distillation is technically precise. Minor: entropy H(tau) strictly increasing is asserted without proof.
justifications.completeness: All seven stated learning objectives have clear, fully developed corresponding content. Critical gap: only one exercise exists in the entire chapter with no difficulty tag ([B]/[I]/[A]). Per project conventions, every exercises section must include at least one of each difficulty level. A chapter of this length and scope (2,650+ lines, 7 LOs, 9 major sections) should have 6–10 exercises minimum.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives are explicit upfront and map to clearly labelled sections. The deepdive/context/remark/example environment structure is used effectively. Financial examples are woven throughout. Chapter summary and roadmap table are strong. However, the near-absence of exercises (one exercise, no difficulty tags) is a serious pedagogical deficiency: readers have no structured self-assessment mechanism covering attention, sampling, RAG, LoRA, or hallucination mitigation.
justifications.style: Table floats are now properly structured (all five captionof/center tables corrected). Numbered subsections are used consistently. Citations use \citet/\citep correctly. Code listings are clean. No \paragraph{} or inline \textbf{} violations. Dangling internal reference \ref{sec:limitations-hallucinations} (line ~1073) will produce '??' — correct label is sec:hallucinations. Two listings lack \label commands (acceptable, not cross-referenced).
